steps: File NTA Form 11 (Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax) with MUFG Custody to recover JPY 119,850 excess withholding tax
Submit documentation proving Norwegian tax residency and JP-NO treaty eligibility for 10% rate on Nintendo Co Ltd dividends
Request MUFG Custody apply correct 10% treaty rate (JPY 1,198,500 tax) instead of applied higher rate for account 2401234567

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
NTA – Application Forms for Income Tax Convention (Form 1 for dividends)
